mission_control_directive: Core members will serve as Mission Control unless their story is progressing in their respective branches.
real_world_events_ingested: Declassified UFO/UAP files (Project Blue Book, etc.)
CIA operative interviews on paranormal Cold War projects (MKUltra, Project Star Gate)
aesthetic_and_tone_progression: Early: CRT/VHS/pixel art, nostalgic teen adventures.
Middle: Neon retro-futurism, young adult training, global missions.
Late: Full cyberpunk/Blade Runner aesthetic, interstellar operations, mature tone.
procedural_mechanics: Nomadz Cards: Track missions, anomalies, artifacts, and story outcomes.
AI Daemons: Generate procedural missions, team growth, anomaly interactions.
Missions: Episodic global/interstellar operations, HQ oversight, expanded Nomadz teams.
All procedural events isolated per branch; no narrative bleed-through.
locking_and_persistence: All branches, media content, Nomadz Cards, AI-generated procedural events are locked and persistent. Core members are immutable. No story content contaminates GUI or backend systems. Older content is preserved separately and intact.
